label: The Severance Cistern
description: A deep interior cave chamber cut by ancient fissures that run like seams through iron-dark stone, its walls scored with tool marks from abandoned extraction. A cold, mineral-rich seep gathers in a central basin, leaving pale crusts on ledges and a persistent metallic tang in the air. The ceiling drops into low arches supported by natural ribs of basalt, and scattered cairn-stones mark prior surveys and hazard boundaries. Sound carries with unusual clarity, turning small movements into prolonged echoes that complicate navigation and watch discipline.
